Skip to contents
nla 0.1.0
  • Reference

Generate a simple daily temperature triangle curve

Source: R/dailytemps.R
dt_tri.Rd

Generate a simple daily temperature triangle curve

Usage

dt_tri(
  dtr,
  tbar,
  sunrise = 6,
  resolution = 1,
  tempdecimalprecision = 1,
  clamp = TRUE
)

Arguments

dtr

Daily temperature range.

tbar

A vector of target mean temperatures.

sunrise

The time that the sun rises.

resolution

The resolution of the time series in hours.

clamp

Whether to clamp the output between min(tbar) and max(tbar), defaults to TRUE.

Value

A matrix of 24/resolution (rows) x length(tbar) (cols) containing temperature values at given times.

Note

If length(tbar) == 1, clamp is automatically set to FALSE.

Examples

dt_tri(dtr = 15, tbar = seq(20,45,0.1), sunrise = 6, resolution = 0.5, clamp = TRUE)
#>        20 20.1 20.2 20.3 20.4 20.5 20.6 20.7 20.8 20.9   21 21.1 21.2 21.3 21.4
#> 6    20.0 20.0 20.0 20.0 20.0 20.0 20.0 20.0 20.0 20.0 20.0 20.0 20.0 20.0 20.0
#> 6.5  20.0 20.0 20.0 20.0 20.0 20.0 20.0 20.0 20.0 20.0 20.0 20.0 20.0 20.0 20.0
#> 7    20.0 20.0 20.0 20.0 20.0 20.0 20.0 20.0 20.0 20.0 20.0 20.0 20.0 20.0 20.0
